dct_title_s: Tab. III. Africae, in qua Cyrenaica, Marmarica, ac Lybia exterior : medius meridianus 56, reliqui inclinantur ad hunc ratione 25 et 30 parallelorum
dct_description_sm: Coordinates approximate and based on Greenwich meridian
Ptolemaic map of eastern Libya and Egypt with numerous ancient place names, particularly along the course of the Nile
Title in an ornamental cartouche. Colored boundaries, mountain ranges, lakes, rivers, towns and settlements. With a dragon, 2 lions, a giant lizard and an ostrich

Map is most likely appears in: Claudii Ptolemaei Tabulae geographicae orbis terrarum veteribus cogniti. Trajecti ad Rhenum [Utrecht] : Apud Franciscum Halmam, Guiljelmum vande Water, Bibliop.; Franecquerae [Franeker] : Apud Leonardum Strick, Bibliop., 1698
dct_publisher_sm: [Apud Franciscum Halmam, Guiljelmum vande Water, Bibliop.]
